paper.title: Proximal Policy Optimization
paper.abstract: We’re releasing a new class of reinforcement learning algorithms, Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), which perform comparably or better than state-of-the-art approaches while being much simpler to implement and tune. PPO has become the default reinforcement learning algorithm at OpenAI because of its ease of use and good performance.

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
